nasb.text: As for his father, because he practiced extortion, robbed his brother and did what was not good among his people, behold, he will die for his iniquity.

esv.text: As for his father, because he practiced extortion, robbed his brother, and did what is not good among his people, behold, he shall die for his iniquity.

cnv.text: 至於他的父親，因為他勒索，搶奪兄弟的物件，在自己的同胞中行不善的事，所以他必因自己的罪孽而滅亡。

ccb.text: 他父亲因肆意欺诈，掠夺同胞，多行不义，必自招灭亡。
